3231920.name: Project SJHG
3231920.description:
Special thanks to Haetae for granting permission to use the character and artwork.

It requires at least 5G of VRAM to run properly.

Requires at least a Ryzen 2600 CPU and a graphics card equivalent to or higher than an RTX 2060 with DirectX 12 support.

Introduction

  • Developer

    • Mainly developed by one person, with 1–2 others contributing on a case-by-case basis.

  • Genre

    • Action RPG (Soulslike Style)

  • Development Status

    • Early Access / Demo

  • Core Systems

    • Divine Orb Growth, Challenging Combat, Multiverse Exploration through Portals

  • Features

    • Variable Combat Styles(Planned), Powerful Boss Battles

World & Gameplay

A peaceful morning somewhere in Yeongwol Mountain.
However, the once-familiar mountain trail is strangely twisted, and a mysterious portal reveals an entirely different world.
Though you manage to return home, time around your house flows abnormally fast.
The path leading down to the city has completely vanished, and people caught in the phenomenon begin taking shelter in your house.
Among them are those who may not even belong to this world.


You must uncover the reason behind this distorted world—and restore it.Players will travel across multiple connected worlds and explore diverse regions.
Along the way, they will encounter various enemies and occasionally defeat powerful foes for special rewards.
The Divine Orb system allows players to adapt their combat styles and face stronger enemies.
Players will discover hidden clues in each region and interact with NPCs to piece together the overarching story. (Story-related clues will be expanded through future updates.)

Main Regions

  • Yeongwol Mountain & Rift in Space-Time

    • The beginning where reality and unreality intersect. Portals connect to other worlds.

  • Twisted Forest

    • A forest once home to nature spirits, now entangled with invading goblins.

  • Desert Canyon

    • A space where past and present collide.  (Currently under development)

  • Snowfield

    • Planned

  • Joseon-era World

    • Planned

  • ???

    • Planned

Core Systems

  • Divine Orb & Fragments

    • As the world changes, your power shatters and scatters.

      You must collect fragments to enhance and expand your abilities.

    • A core growth system that allows flexible changes in combat style.

  • Divine Fragments

    • Equip fragments into the Orb’s "Core" to apply new traits.

  • Divine Core System

    • Unlock internal slots in each core to gain further enhancements.

  • Traits

    • Each fragment grants special properties and modifies combat behavior.

The combination of Divine Fragments and Cores can fundamentally change your combat style.

Growth

Soulslike Growth System

  • Defeat enemies or use items to collect Souls and level up.

  • Choose one of the following stats to improve: HP / Mana / Stamina / Strength / Dexterity / Intelligence / Willpower

Growth through the Divine Orb

  • Unlocking Core slots grants new powers and strengthens existing ones.

  • Fragments are acquired through exploration. Slots can be unlocked, and attributes can be added to fragments. Fully unlocking a line of slots grants special bonuses. Each Core has a different slot structure and line arrangement.

Growth via Equipment System

  • Equip weapons (Sprites), armor (Auras), and accessories (Ring).

  • Sprites and Auras can be strengthened and enhanced with attributes.

Combat Styles & Characters

Default Playable Character

  • White Tiger (Playable)

    • Melee combat focused on dodging and striking

    • Intuitive controls, close-range combat

  • Wolf (Planned)

    • Stack-based mid-range combat using talismans

  • Fox (Planned)

    • High-risk, high-reward counter-attack focused combat

      Has no HP; dies upon exceeding a certain number of hits

Each Sprites (weapon) uses different animation sets, enabling a wide variety of play styles beyond the base characters.

NPC

  • Enhancement & Elemental Infusion (See: Equipment System)

  • Stat boosts and slot unlocking for Divine Orb (See: Orb Growth System)

  • Special item exchange via boss soul shards

  • Returning Lost Parcels : Find and return lost NPC parcels during exploration to unlock new shop items.

  • Potion Enhancement : Bring specific materials to NPCs to increase potion charges and healing power.

Some NPCs or characters may not have 3D models.
